tr.td: Called before PID allocation in copy_process

ul.li: Threshold: Rejection occurs when pids.current >= pids.max.
Outcome: Atomic rejection of process creation prevents kernel stack exhaustion.
Scope: Applied recursively to all descendants in the cgroup hierarchy.
Host Security: Prevents PID exhaustion attacks against the init process and critical services.

g.title: The process executing the fork loop

g.text: Isolation Boundary Verified. Global PID table protected.

g.title: The process executing the fork loop
